name: Telegram Footer Plugin
description: Append a Telegram reply footer at send time using OpenClaw hooks, without patching dist bundles.

channels.label: Channels
channels.help: Target channels for footer injection. Defaults to ["telegram"].

directOnly.label: Direct chats only
directOnly.help: When enabled, skip Telegram chat ids that look like groups/channels (negative ids).

separator.label: Footer separator
separator.help: Line inserted above the compact footer.

contextLimit.label: Context limit override
contextLimit.help: Optional manual context-window limit when auto-detection cannot find one.

thinkingFallback.label: Thinking fallback
thinkingFallback.help: Used when the current thinking level cannot be inferred from session state.

cacheTtlMs.label: Footer cache TTL (ms)
cacheTtlMs.help: How long to keep precomputed footer mappings between transcript write and outbound send.
